V-M-034.checks: Emergency relocation runbook must restore service on replacement RU/DE servers using existing deploy/install scripts unchanged.
V-M-034.commands: manual DR walkthrough using existing deploy/install scripts plus restore manifest checklist

module-checks.check-1: Runbook defines freeze, backup, fresh deployment, restore, validation, cutover, and rollback steps.
module-checks.check-2: Runbook explicitly forbids modifying deploy/ and install.sh as part of recovery planning.
module-checks.check-3: Runbook separates local dry-run checks from live VPS checks.

scenarios.scenario-1: Operator can follow the runbook from a backup bundle to a validated replacement deployment.
scenarios.scenario-2: Restore procedure loses device-client linkage or invalidates existing configs without explicit rotation.
scenarios.scenario-3: Recovery steps print secrets, tokens, passwords, private keys, or raw .env content into logs.
